# Copilot Instructions for tommanmaz.github.io

## Project Overview
Personal academic homepage for Tommaso Mannelli Mazzoli (TU Wien). Focus:
research on the Bus Driver Scheduling Problem (BDSP) and solutions to
American Mathematical Monthly (AMM) problems. Static site on GitHub Pages
— plain HTML/CSS/JS, no build step (Jekyll config is present but used only
for default theme metadata).

## Navigable pages
- `index.html` — home / bio / contact
- `publications.html` — papers, preprints, theses
- `bdsp.html` — BDSP problem description + interactive instance collection table
- `bdsp_instance.html` — dynamic per-instance detail page (reached via `?instance=<name>`)
- `bdsp_validate.html` — client-side BDSP solution validator
- `amm.html` — AMM problem catalog with MathJax

## Shared chrome
Every page has the same skip-link + header + navbar + footer, plus a
single dark-mode toggle script at `js/theme-toggle.js`. Keep them
uniform across pages — there is no template engine.

## Styling
- Single canonical stylesheet: `stylesheet.css`
- Palette: warm burnt-orange accent (`--primary: #A54918`) with a full
  dark-mode override under `[data-theme="dark"]`
- Typography: system font stack; size scale via `--fs-xs/sm/base/lg`
- Status colors (optimal / open): `--status-*` variables
- Do not hardcode colors or sizes in page-level `<style>` blocks — add to
  `stylesheet.css` instead

## BDSP data pipeline
Everything under `data/instances.json` (+ `data/instances.js` inline
copy) is generated by `scripts/build_instance_data.py`. Inputs live in
`scripts/data/` (old-algorithm CSVs, PATAT metadata) and on the author's
machine outside this repo (instance JSONs, JAIR results). Re-run the
script after any data change.

## MathJax
Loaded with `defer` only on pages that render math: `bdsp.html`,
`bdsp_instance.html`, `bdsp_validate.html`, `amm.html`. Skip it on
`index.html` / `publications.html`.

## CV artifacts
LaTeX sources (`altacv.cls`, `*.tex`) live under `docs/cv-build/`. The
published PDF is `CV-Tommaso.pdf` at the repo root (linked from
`index.html`).
